allow: PowerShell($g = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { Write-Output "INSTALLED: $\($g.Source\)"; git --version } else { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED" })
PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; & $gh auth status; Write-Output "--- credential helper ---"; git config --global credential.helper)
